_note: Deterministic hype-tell rules and source reputation for the sports desk. This is the fail-closed BELT: a rule-based first net that runs offline and is unit-tested by the canary. The editor AI is the SUSPENDERS (Stage 2) and the verifier AI is a second, independent net (Stage 3). Sports translation of the crypto shill belt: tout/betting bait, unsourced rumor churn, and engagement-bait hot takes instead of coin shilling. Tune over time; living file.

tells.pattern: \b(lock of the (day|week|year)|guaranteed (win|winner|pick)|can'?t[- ]miss (pick|parlay|bet)|sure thing|free picks?|best bets? (today|tonight)|expert picks? (win|cash))\b

tells.reason: unsourced rumor dressed in hype language

tells.pattern: \b(you won'?t believe|shocking truth|the real reason|what (he|she|they) said next|goes viral|breaks the internet)\b
\b(sponsored|in partnership with|presented by|paid post|paid partnership|promoted|advertorial|press release distribution|prnewswire|globe ?newswire|via businesswire)\b
\b(promo code|bonus bets?|risk[- ]free bet|deposit match|new user offer|sign[- ]up bonus)\b
\b(all[- ]time great|greatest ever|goat debate|washed|fraud|exposed|era is over|dynasty is dead|guaranteed|surefire)\b
\b(allegedly said|is said to have told|per an unnamed|according to a source close to)\b
tells.reason: quote attributed to no one checkable (verify against a primary source)

source_reputation._note: Multiplier on a source's baseline trust. > 1 raises weight (official league sources), < 1 lowers it. Editor and verifier both receive these so a single low-rep source cannot carry a top story alone.

known_low_rep_domains._note: Domains with pay-for-coverage, tout-network, or aggregation-mill reputations. Not a blocklist; a heavy weight penalty. Extend over time.

thresholds._note: shill_score >= reject_score => the pre-pass marks the item shill_rejected=true (editor still sees it, with the reason, so it can override up if the tells are a false positive on real news). >= flag_score => flagged for the editor's attention.
